thread.title: NYC Proposal to Restrict Property Tax Challenges Draws Fire
thread.title_full: NYC Proposal to Restrict Property Tax Challenges Draws Fire

author: Danielle Muoio Dunn
title: NYC Proposal to Restrict Property Tax Challenges Draws Fire
text:
New York City real estate lawyers fought back Friday against a Department of Finance proposal to limit how taxpayers can challenge property assessments that determine their yearly tax bills.
The department said in its [rule notice](https://rules.cityofnewyork.us/rule/amendment-of-rules-relating-to-request-for-review-process-and-clerical-error-administrative-review-process/) that it aims to “reorganize and consolidate” two processes for arguing against assessments and taxation, at least in part to limit the city’s exposure to prolonged protests. But tax attorneys said at a hearing on the proposal that the revisions unfairly make it harder to contest assessments that can result in higher tax bills.
Attorneys criticized proposed limitations, including reduced time for challenging clerical ...
